untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Gap magnitude definition (AUTHOR_SILENT - no value provided), (2) Designated bar identification (AUTHOR_SILENT - no bar number specified), (3) Dynamic stop-and-reverse at intraday extremes (high/low at entry time), which requires tracking entry bar's high/low separately from current bar values. The framework does not support time-of-entry extremes or intraday stop adjustment logic. Additionally, 'stop and reverse' logic (closing position + reversing direction) is not directly expressible with standard entry/exit conditions.
translation_notes: The signal is event-driven (opening gap) with context-dependent direction, but critical parameters are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Gap detection attempted using open vs prev_close comparison, but true gap magnitude and designated bar number are missing. The stop-and-reverse mechanism at day's extreme at time of entry and EOD exit require custom logic beyond standard condition rules.
